title: Change of His Majesty’s Ambassador to Egypt: Mark Bryson-Richardson
body: "Mr Mark Bryson-Richardson MBE has been appointed His Majesty’s Ambassador to the Arab Republic of Egypt in succession to Mr Gareth Bayley OBE who will be transferring to another Diplomatic Service appointment. Mr Bryson-Richardson will take up his appointment during August 2025.  Curriculum Vitae  Full name: Mark Bryson-Richardson     Year Role     2023 to 2025 FCDO, Foreign Secretary’s Representative for Humanitarian Affairs in the Occupied Palestinian Territories   2021 to 2023 Baghdad, His Majesty’s Ambassador   2019 to 2020 DFID, Director Middle East, North Africa and Eastern Europe   2014 to 2019 Stabilisation Unit, Director   2013 to 2014 Baghdad, Deputy Head of Mission   2013 Mogadishu, Deputy Head of Mission   2011 to 2012 FCO, Head of Libya Group and Middle East Operations   2008 to 2010 Kabul, Political Counsellor   2006 to 2008 FCO, Head of Middle East Peace Process Team   2005 Khartoum, Deputy Head of Mission   2003 to 2004 Khartoum, Second Secretary Political   2000 to 2002 FCO, Cairo, Full Time Arabic language training   1999 to 2000 FCO, European Union Department (Internal)   1999 Joined FCO      Media enquiries     Email newsdesk@fcdo.gov.uk     Telephone 020 7008 3100    Email the FCDO Newsdesk (monitored 24 hours a day) in the first instance, and we will respond as soon as possible.   "
